---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: >-
  CV of Natalia Gumińska, PhD. Postdoctoral researcher in RNA biology,
  bioinformatics and research software engineering.
pagetitle: "CV"
toc: true
---

<!-- The PDF is generated from cv/cv.qmd by Quarto's bundled Typst engine.
     To publish a hand-made file instead, drop it in this folder as
     Natalia-Guminska-CV.pdf and delete cv/cv.qmd. Keep the two in sync:
     this page and cv.qmd duplicate content by design, because the print
     version needs different pacing than the web version. -->

::: {.btn-row .reveal .mb-3}
<a class="btn-cta" href="Natalia-Guminska-CV.pdf" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down"></i> Download PDF</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="javascript:window.print()"><i class="bi bi-printer"></i> Print</a>
:::

::: {.lead}
**Natalia Gumińska, PhD.** Postdoctoral researcher, Laboratory of RNA Biology
(ERA Chairs Group), International Institute of Molecular and Cell Biology in
Warsaw. [nguminska@iimcb.gov.pl](mailto:nguminska@iimcb.gov.pl) ·
[ORCID 0000-0002-4599-2897](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4599-2897) ·
[github.com/nemitheasura](https://github.com/nemitheasura)
:::

## Profile

Molecular biologist and research software engineer working on RNA tailing. I
develop methods and open-source software for Oxford Nanopore direct RNA
sequencing, focused on poly(A) tail length and composition, with a parallel
background in euglenid genomics. Author of the ninetails package (*Nature
Communications*, 2025) and co-author on papers in *Nature*, *Science Advances*,
*PLOS Genetics* and *RNA*.

## Employment

**2020 — present** · Postdoctoral Researcher
Laboratory of RNA Biology (ERA Chairs Group), International Institute of
Molecular and Cell Biology in Warsaw.

## Education

| Years | Degree | Institution |
|:--|:--|:--|
| 2025 — present | Postgraduate, Python Data Science Engineer | Koźminski University, Warsaw |
| 2021 — 2022 | Postgraduate, Data Science with R (with honours) | Faculty of Economic Sciences, University of Warsaw |
| 2015 — 2020 | PhD, Biology / molecular biology (with honours) | Faculty of Biology, University of Warsaw |
| 2012 — 2015 | M.Sc., Biotechnology | Faculty of Biology, University of Warsaw |
| 2012 — 2014 | M.Sc., Polish philology (with honours) | Faculty of Polish Studies, University of Warsaw |
| 2010 — 2013 | B.Sc., Biotechnology | Faculty of Biology, University of Warsaw |
| 2009 — 2012 | B.Sc., Polish philology | Faculty of Polish Studies, University of Warsaw |

## Selected publications

Full list on the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page.

- Gumińska N. et al. Direct profiling of non-adenosines in poly(A) tails of
  endogenous and therapeutic mRNAs with Ninetails. ***Nature Communications***
  (2025).
- Krawczyk P.S. et al. (incl. Gumińska N.) Re-adenylation by TENT5A enhances
  efficacy of SARS-CoV-2 mRNA vaccines. ***Nature*** (2025).
- Gumińska N. et al. Polyadenylation landscape after in vivo long-term
  potentiation in the rat brain. ***RNA*** (2025).
- Czarnocka-Cieciura A. & Gumińska N. rDNAmine: a new tool for the analysis of
  long repetitive sequences. ***Yeast*** (2026).
- Gumińska N., Zakryś B., Milanowski R. A new type of circular RNA derived from
  nonconventional introns in nuclear genes of euglenids. ***J. Mol. Biol.***
  (2021).
- Gumińska N., Płecha M., Zakryś B., Milanowski R. Order of removal of
  conventional and nonconventional introns from nuclear transcripts of
  *Euglena gracilis*. ***PLOS Genetics*** (2018).

## Research grants

- **2018 — 2021** Characteristics of circular extrachromosomal DNA in euglenids.
  Polish National Science Centre, Preludium 14 (2017/27/N/NZ2/01321).
- **2017 — 2019** Diversity and population dynamics of phototrophic euglenids
  based on the V2 18S rDNA region. University of Warsaw, Faculty of Biology
  grant for young scientists.

## Awards

Prof. W. Krzyżosiak Award, Polish Academy of Sciences (2026, team member). Best
poster awards at the RNA Society Annual Meetings in Edinburgh (2024) and Boulder
(2022), the 1st Polish RNA Meeting (2023), and the 8th European Congress of
Protistology (2019). Holz-Conner Travel Award (2017). Rector's awards for
scientific achievement (2016, 2019). Rector's scholarships and the Indeks
Start2Star Scholarship.

## Software

**ninetails** (author), **nanotail2** (author), **NanoQuRe** and **lachesis**
(contributor), **rDNAmine** (co-author), plus relational SQL databases for the
laboratory. Details on the [Software](../software.qmd) and
[Stack](../stack.qmd) pages.

## Skills

**Languages:** R, Python, SQL, Bash
**Research:** nanopore direct RNA sequencing, poly(A) tail analysis, molecular
biology, euglenid genomics
**Data:** tidyverse, ggplot2, Bioconductor, Keras, machine learning, relational
database design
**Tooling:** Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, Quarto, Linux

## Teaching

Lecturer, Girls Code Fun Foundation (2026), and the Nanopore Direct RNA
Sequencing Workshop at Adam Mickiewicz University (2024).

## Service

Postdoc Representative, IIMCB (2020 — 2023). Secretary of the Electoral
Committee, Faculty of Biology, University of Warsaw (2016 — 2018).

## Languages

Polish (native), English.

<p class="text-muted-2"><small>Last updated <span class="js-year">2026</span>.</small></p>
